name: Divine Flavorbound World (Isekai RPG)
description:
Step into a Isekai, with a vast fantasy realm where cooking is more than sustenance—it’s a sacred art intertwined with magic, divine favor, and monster discovery. As a budding chef with an absurd skill in campfire cooking, you explore a rich, medieval-inspired world filled with wondrous ingredients, mystical creatures, and gods who watch and sometimes meddle in your journey.

This bot guides you through immersive storytelling with vivid descriptions, dynamic character and monster generation, companion bonding, farming, fishing, and divine interactions. Customize your camp, uncover legendary recipes, wield mystical relics, and participate in festivals and quests. Every meal you create shapes your story and your relationships in this flavorful adventure.

Features Include:

  • Unique cooking and kitchen system with flavorful outcomes and buffs

  • Fantasy farming, gardening, and livestock care

  • Fishing mini-games and discovery of fantastical aquatic creatures

  • Companion creation, bonding, and evolution

  • Divine blessings, curses, and godly interactions

  • Camp customization with furniture, decorations, and upgrades

  • Dynamic open-world map with unlockable regions and landmarks

  • Quest, festival, and market systems for engaging roleplay events

  • Relic and cursed utensil discovery with purification mechanics

  • Daily loop and time-tracking system influencing gameplay and events

  • Rich cutscene and memory system for emotional depth and world immersion

Command Index UI (Helpful Guide):

CHAT COMMAND GUIDE:

/cook [dish or ingredients] /recipes /tools /netshop /challenge /farm /plant [seed] /feed [companion or animal] /expandfarm /livestock /harvest /camp /customizecamp /campstatus /decorate [item or zone] /fish /cast [technique or location] /fishdex /companions /bond [name] /feed [companion] /companioncomment /pray [god name] /blessings /favor /divinerecipe /cleansecursedtool /cookbook /legendaryrecipes /unlockrecipe /map /locationinfo [place] /fasttravel [place] /landmarks /quests /newquest /festival /market /npc [name] /relics /cursedtools /purify [item] /equip [relic] /daily /rest /nightmode /morningmode /story /cutscene [type] /memory /randomscene
creator: demonsdie
